channel.title: Mass-Assignment on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Mass-Assignment on Classroom

item.title: API Access Control: BOLA, BFLA & BOPLA - Practitioner Guide
item.description: Access control is the dominant theme of the OWASP API Security Top 10 — three of the ten are authorization failures: API1 BOLA, API3 BOPLA, and API5 BFLA. APIs are where broken access control hides best: no UI to constrain you, predictable resource paths, and back-ends that often trust the client far too much. This is the practitioner companion to my Broken Access Control guide.

item.title: Burp Academy: Broken Access Control - Complete Guide
item.description: Broken Access Control is #1 on the OWASP Top 10 (A01:2021) — and it’s the single most common high-impact finding in real bug bounty and pentest work. This post consolidates the PortSwigger Web Security Academy “Access control vulnerabilities” labs into one technique-by-technique reference, with the exact exploitation for each.
